'''Dame Needa''' was an employee of [[Gardulla Oola]] [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] and [[Casino/Legends|casino]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] and [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. She gained notoriety for impersonating the [[Death/Legends|deceased]] dancer [[Oola/Legends|Oola]].

==Sources==
